name: Healthpeak Properties, Inc.
description: Healthpeak Properties, Inc. is a fully integrated real estate investment trust (REIT) and S&P 500 company. The company owns, operates, and develops high-quality healthcare real estate focused on life science, outpatient medical, and retirement properties. Healthpeak partners with leading healthcare providers and research institutions to deliver institutional-grade properties that support the growing demand for healthcare services and scientific discovery across the United States.
